approved_by: human governance decision to attach execution plans to pending expeditions E14–E20

input_snapshot.algorithm: sha256 over sorted per-file sha256 digests (excluding .DS_Store)

changes.change: Added execution_plan objects to E14, E15, E16, E17, E18, E19, and E20.
changes.justification: Plans are expedition-local metadata describing the intended transformation, prerequisites, deliverables, validation, and exclusions. Storing them in the Expedition primitive keeps planning state inside governance without invoking implementation capabilities.

invariants_verified: knowledge/ untouched: input snapshot hash identical to genesis-0001.
No implementation capabilities invoked during this governance update.
Every plan traces to TASKPRO-BUILD-002 and the existing expedition transformation.
Completed expeditions E1–E13 were not modified.
